{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The critique identifies and contrasts VariScore-2 with multiple prior works (ESM-1v, EVE, AlphaMissense, MSA Transformer, Tranception) and clearly articulates the specific contributions of the new model.",
    "R1.7": "The critique flags missing citations for key works (AlphaMissense, ESM-1v/EVE, REVEL) and provides precise bibliographic references to these works, ensuring thorough scholarship.",
    "RX.1": "The critique clearly identifies uncertainties in several claims, such as the novelty of MSA transformers, the clinical adoption claim, and the provenance of the in-house panel.",
    "RX.3": "The critique stays within the scope of the provided paragraph, addressing all aspects of the content without drifting into unrelated areas.",
    "RX.4": "The critique avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues that could be problematic if not addressed (e.g., unsupported superlatives, missing context).",
    "RX.5": "Every major point in the critique is traced back to specific parts of the original paragraph, providing clear provenance for each recommendation."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The critique identifies and contrasts VariScore-2 with multiple prior works (ESM-1v, EVE, AlphaMissense, MSA Transformer, Tranception) and clearly articulates the specific contributions of the new model.
rationale.R1.7: The critique flags missing citations for key works (AlphaMissense, ESM-1v/EVE, REVEL) and provides precise bibliographic references to these works, ensuring thorough scholarship.
rationale.RX.1: The critique clearly identifies uncertainties in several claims, such as the novelty of MSA transformers, the clinical adoption claim, and the provenance of the in-house panel.
rationale.RX.3: The critique stays within the scope of the provided paragraph, addressing all aspects of the content without drifting into unrelated areas.
rationale.RX.4: The critique avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues that could be problematic if not addressed (e.g., unsupported superlatives, missing context).
rationale.RX.5: Every major point in the critique is traced back to specific parts of the original paragraph, providing clear provenance for each recommendation.
